name: End-to-End Automated Item Generation and Scoring for Adaptive English Writing Assessment with Large Language Models
venue: Proceedings of the 20th Workshop on Innovative Use of NLP for Building Educational Applications
summary: BEA 2025 paper describing automated generation, annotation, and integration of adaptive English writing items, including synthetic response datasets annotated by a majority-vote LLM ensemble benchmarked against expert human ratings.

access_attempts.notes: ACL Anthology PDF is available and was used for majority-vote annotation and Cohen kappa extraction.
